responses.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Used the reference lyrics for '色っぽい じれったい' and 'FOREVER LOVE'. Verified phonetic pronunciations against the vocal audio (e.g. confirming '気気取ってる子供も' over other lyrics site variations).
2. JSON Usage: Fully aligned with the reference lyrics when active; discarded unused/unheard sections. Addressed visual-only events during the transition slide show (member name screens) where there are no vocals.
3. Timing & Pacing: Maintained absolute vocal-anchored timing. Avoided ghost subtitles during long instrumental gaps (02:15 to 02:48 and 04:18 to 04:48) and applied quick transitions during rapid verse delivery.

subtitles.original: 止まらないミュージック

subtitles.english: A bouquet of flowers from my lover,
and a message that arrives at midnight.

subtitles.original: 女の子なら 誰でも思う
やさしくされりゃ うれしいけど
色っぽい キューピット
じれったい キスもっと
subtitles.english: ...and an impatient kiss, give me more.
With a racing heartbeat on this sexy island.
and the kids acting all grown up...

subtitles.original: この愛を見届けてほしい
subtitles.english: ...I want them to witness this love.
A weekend of talking to myself.

subtitles.original: あなたと来れたら 嬉しい
subtitles.english: I'd be so happy if I could come with you.

subtitles.original: 不思議なニオイに クンクン
抱きしめて 離さないで
subtitles.english: Hold me tight and never let me go.

subtitles.original: 色っぽい ビスケット
じれったい 秘密もっと
subtitles.english: ...and an impatient secret, tell me more.

subtitles.original: ずっと続くの SEXY ISLAND
subtitles.english: It will go on forever on this sexy island.
To the future, making a grand approach.

subtitles.original: どこまでも抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Hold me close, no matter how far.
